zh.lifeSummary: 當William Buckeley於1489年出生在英國史洛普爾武爾時，他的父親Humphrey Bulkeley Esq.39歲，母親Cecily Moulton39歲。他於1509年與Beatrice Hill在英國史洛普爾武爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1514年住在英國貝德福爾貝德福德。他去世於1571年3月4日在英國史洛普爾享年82歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾姆可萊斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Buckeley于1489年出生在英国史洛普爾武爾时，他的父亲Humphrey Bulkeley Esq.39岁，母亲Cecily Moulton39岁。他于1509年与Beatrice Hill在英国史洛普爾武爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1514年住在英国貝德福爾貝德福德。他去世于1571年3月4日在英国史洛普爾享年82岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾姆可萊斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Buckeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When William Buckeley was born in 1489, in Woore, Shropshire, England, his father, Humphrey Bulkeley Esq., was 39 and his mother, Cecily Moulton, was 39. He married Beatrice Hill in 1509, in Woore, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England in 1514. He died on 4 March 1571, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Mucklestone, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Buckeley est né en 1489, à Woore, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Bulkeley Esq., avait 39 ans et sa mère, Cecily Moulton, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Hill en 1509, à Woore, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre en 1514. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1571, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Buckeley 1489 in Woore, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. 39 und seine Mutter Cecily Moulton 39. Er hat 1509 in Woore, Shropshire, England Beatrice Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1514 hat er in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 4. März 1571 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Shropshire, England und wurde in Mucklestone, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Buckeley è nato il nel 1489 nel Woore, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Humphrey Bulkeley Esq., aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Moulton, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Hill nel 1509, nel Woore, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Bedford, Bedfordshire, England nel 1514. Morì il 4 marzo 1571, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Mucklestone, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Buckeleyが1489年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウアで生まれた時，父Humphrey Bulkeley Esq.は39歳，母Cecily Moultonは39歳であった。1509年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウアでBeatrice Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1514年にはイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードに住んでいた。彼は1571年3月4日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで82歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアムックレストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Buckeley(이)가 1489년 영국 슈럽실르 보어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Bulkeley Esq.(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Moulton(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1509년 영국 슈럽실르 보어에서 Beatrice Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1514년도에 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1571년 3월 4일 영국 슈럽실르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 무클레스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Buckeley nasceu em 1489, em Woore, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Bulkeley Esq., tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Moulton, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Hill em 1509, em Woore, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra em 1514. Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1571, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Buckeley родился в 1489 г. в местности вур, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Moulton, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Hill в 1509 г. в местности вур, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия в 1514 году. Он умер 4 марта 1571 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности мукклестоун, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Buckeley nació en 1489, en Woore, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Bulkeley Esq., tenía 39 años y su mamá, Cecily Moulton, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Beatrice Hill en 1509, en Woore, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra en 1514. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1571, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
